app.title: Interest Calculator
app.description: Calculate your wealth with compound interest and monthly contributions

summary.base: If you invest {{monthly}} monthly at {{rate}}% for {{years}} years
summary.withIncrease: , increasing your contributions by {{increase}}% per year
summary.result: you will reach a final capital of {{final}}.
summary.resultNet: you will reach a final capital of {{final}} (net after taxes).
summary.breakdown: This consists of {{contributions}} in deposits and {{interest}} in capital gains.
summary.breakdownNet: This consists of {{contributions}} in deposits, {{grossInterest}} in gross capital gains, minus {{tax}} in taxes, leaving {{netInterest}} in net gains.
summary.realValue: Adjusted for inflation ({{inflation}}%), this is worth {{real}} in today's money.
summary.taxNote: Taxes calculated year-by-year with a {{allowance}} annual tax-free allowance (unused portions do not carry forward).
summary.taxNoteGermany: German Abgeltungssteuer (25% + 5.5% solidarity surcharge = 26.375%) applied year-by-year with a {{allowance}} annual tax-free allowance (unused portions do not carry forward).
summary.taxNoteAustria: Austrian KESt (25%) applied year-by-year with a {{allowance}} annual tax-free allowance (unused portions do not carry forward).
